title: Assistant Store Manager - Vijay Sales International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Vijay Sales International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vijay Sales International Enterprises! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vijay Sales International Enterprises:
Vijay Sales International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales International Enterprises!
